title: Oil choppy after U.S. completes Iran strikes following Apache helicopter attack
summary: The U.S. launched military strikes against Iran, causing oil prices to rise as investors worry about potential disruptions to shipping through the Strait of Hormuz. The escalating tensions could threaten critical energy routes.
content: Oil prices rose after the U.S. launched military strikes against Iran, raising concerns that renewed clashes may threaten shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 美国完成对伊朗打击后油价波动，源于阿帕奇直升机攻击事件
zh.summary: 美国对伊朗发动军事打击，导致油价上升，投资者担忧通过霍尔木兹海峡的海运可能受到中断。局势升级可能威胁关键能源路线。

title: SoftBank sinks 10% as Asia tech stocks tumble, tracking Wall Street losses
summary: Asian semiconductor and technology stocks fell on Wednesday, with SoftBank dropping 10% as markets tracked overnight losses from Wall Street. The selloff reflects broader concerns in the tech sector.
content: Asian semiconductor and technology stocks fell on Wednesday, tracking overnight losses on Wall Street.

zh.title: 软银下跌10%，亚洲科技股暴跌，跟随华尔街走势
zh.summary: 周三亚洲半导体和科技股下跌，软银下跌10%，市场跟随华尔街隔夜的跌幅。此次抛售反映了科技行业的广泛担忧。

title: What next for BP? Leadership exits test investor confidence in board oversight
summary: An executive exodus at BP has triggered intense scrutiny from investors regarding the company's leadership and board oversight. The departures raise questions about the company's strategic direction.
content: An executive exodus at BP has sparked intense scrutiny from investors.

zh.title: 英国石油公司前景如何？管理层离职考验投资者对董事会监督的信心
zh.summary: 英国石油公司管理层大规模离职引发投资者对公司领导力和董事会监督的严格审查。这些离职引发了对公司战略方向的疑问。

title: UK pint prices up 36% since last World Cup – here's why
summary: UK beer prices have surged 36% since the 2022 World Cup, driven by supply chain disruptions, input cost inflation, and energy price increases. The dramatic increase reflects broader cost-of-living pressures.
content: UK pint prices are up 36% since the last World Cup. We look at why beer now costs so much more.

zh.title: 英国啤酒价格自上届世界杯以来上涨36% — 原因在这里
zh.summary: 自2022年世界杯以来，英国啤酒价格上涨了36%，受供应链中断、输入成本通胀和能源价格上升的驱动。这一急剧增长反映了更广泛的生活成本压力。

title: Beijing escalating AI espionage to catch up with the U.S. on tech, cybersecurity firm says
summary: CrowdStrike reported that China-based entities were responsible for over half of state-sponsored cyberattacks targeting technology firms for artificial intelligence assets. Beijing is intensifying espionage efforts to close its AI gap with the U.S.
content: U.S. cybersecurity giant CrowdStrike said China-based entities made over half of state-sponsored cyberattacks on tech firms for artificial intelligence assets.

zh.title: 网络安全公司称北京升级AI间谍活动以在科技上追赶美国
zh.summary: CrowdStrike报告称，中国相关实体对针对科技公司的国家级网络攻击的一半以上负责，目标是获取人工智能资产。北京正在加强间谍活动以缩小与美国的AI差距。

title: China May wholesale inflation hits near 4-year high on Iran war-led higher input costs, AI boom
summary: China's May wholesale inflation reached near 4-year highs due to the Middle East conflict driving up energy and raw material costs, combined with an AI boom. The reflationary boost reflects global supply chain disruptions.
content: The Middle East conflict has given China's economy a reflationary boost as energy and raw material disruptions deepened.

zh.title: 中国5月批发通胀创近4年新高，受伊朗战争和AI热潮推动
zh.summary: 由于中东冲突推高能源和原材料成本，加上AI繁荣，中国5月批发通胀达到近4年高位。这一再通胀动力反映了全球供应链中断的影响。

title: Oracle’s stock has surged on AI hype. Now it has to deliver the earnings to match.
summary: Oracle's stock has surged on AI enthusiasm, but the company must now prove its earnings can match the hype. Upcoming fourth-quarter results will detail progress on data-center expansion and the financial impact of its AI strategy.
content: Oracle’s fourth-quarter earnings call will deliver critical updates about the progress of its data-center build-out and the financial impact of its AI pivot.

zh.title: 甲骨文股票因AI热潮飙升。现在它必须提供相匹配的收益。
zh.summary: 甲骨文股票因AI热情而飙升，但该公司必须证明其收益能够匹配炒作。即将发布的第四季度财报将详细说明数据中心扩展的进展和AI战略的财务影响。

title: This proposed federal budget cut could eliminate job training for 42,000 vulnerable seniors
summary: Trump's proposed 2027 budget would cut funding for a job-training program serving 42,000 low-income seniors, just as work requirements for food aid and healthcare coverage become stricter. The cuts could leave vulnerable workers without critical support.
content: A job-training program for low-income older adults is set to lose funding under President Donald Trump’s proposed budget for 2027 — just as more stringent work requirements for food aid and healthcare coverage go into effect.

zh.title: 这项提议的联邦预算削减可能会消除42,000名弱势老年人的工作培训
zh.summary: 特朗普提议的2027年预算将削减为42,000名低收入老年人服务的工作培训项目的资金，同时食品援助和医疗覆盖的工作要求变得更严格。这些削减可能会使弱势工人失去关键支持。

title: Super Micro stock plunges as $7 billion equity raise overshadows booming backlog
summary: Super Micro Computer announced a $7 billion equity raise amid massive AI server demand, but investor concerns about cash burn are weighing on sentiment. The company's strong order backlog is being overshadowed by market worries about its financing needs. This reflects the capital-intensive nature of AI infrastructure expansion.
content: Super Micro looks to raise equity as it faces staggering AI demand but also an intense cash burn

zh.title: 超微计算机股价暴跌，70亿美元融资掩盖了蓬勃的订单积压
zh.summary: 超微计算机公司在大规模人工智能服务器需求中宣布了70亿美元融资，但投资者对现金流出的担忧正在影响市场情绪。该公司强劲的订单积压被市场对其融资需求的担忧所掩盖。这反映了人工智能基础设施扩张的资本密集性。

title: Republican Steve Hilton advances to general election in race for California governor
summary: Republican Steve Hilton has qualified for California's gubernatorial general election, positioning himself against the state's Democratic establishment. His campaign emphasizes the need for new leadership after 15+ years of Democratic control. This marks a significant moment in the state's 2026 political cycle.
content: Republican Steve Hilton has advanced to the general election for California governor after making the case that the state desperately needs new leadership following more than 15 years of Democratic dominance.

zh.title: 共和党人史蒂夫·希尔顿晋级加州州长大选
zh.summary: 共和党人史蒂夫·希尔顿已获得加州州长大选的参选资格，将自己与该州民主党建制派相对立。他的竞选强调在民主党控制15年以上后需要新的领导力。这标志着该州2026年政治周期中的一个重要时刻。
